news_items.headline: Every Dodgers transaction throughout 2026 season
news_items.summary: Keeping track of the 40-man roster, one roster move at a time.

news_items.headline: Dodgers 2026 injured list tracker
news_items.summary: This is your one-stop shop for every Dodgers stint on the injured list during the 2026 season. We’ll also include every time a player misses time on the paternity list, bereavement leave, or is on the family medical emergency list as well. Basically any time a player misses time that requires a roster move, we’ll […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers activate Kiké Hernández, designate Santiago Espinal for assignment
news_items.summary: The Dodgers activated infielder/outfielder Kiké Hernández off the 60-day injured list as expected on Monday, and he starts at third base in the series opener against the Colorado Rockies at Dodger Stadium. Santiago Espinal was designated for assignment, which created room on both the active and 40-man rosters for Hernández. Hernández had left elbow surgery […]

news_items.headline: Game #54 GameThread: Marlins @ Jays
news_items.summary: I’m sure you’ve heard the news: Lineups: Today’s Lineups MARLINS BLUE JAYS Xavier Edwards – 2B George Springer – DH Liam Hicks – 1B Nathan Lukes – CF Otto Lopez – SS Yohendrick Pinango – LF Kyle Stowers – DH Kazuma Okamoto – 3B Jakob Marsee – CF Jesus Sanchez – RF Javier Sanoja – […]

news_items.headline: Yankees rally for 4-3 win over Royals despite HRs from Salvador Perez, Bobby Witt Jr.
news_items.summary: Kansas City went ahead on Witt's eighth-inning homer, but Lucas Erceg blew his fourth save of the season by giving up two runs.
